description: Inspect a single agent's detailed config (covers `neomind agent get`; previously only list was covered).

turns.user: What are demo-agent's detailed config fields — schedule, resources, LLM backend, etc.?

per_turn: Turn 1: Agent resolves demo-agent's id then runs `neomind agent get <id>` (or GET /api/agents/<id>), and summarizes key fields
expectations.overall: Answer must be grounded in tool results
